news.headline: New coalition, "Saving California," launches recall effort against Governor Newsom after LA wildfire catastrophe. Newsom to be served recall papers in next two weeks.
news.summary: In the coming two weeks, Governor Gavin Newsom is set to receive formal recall papers from Saving California, a non-partisan coalition comprised of working families, professionals, and community advocates. This development follows a catastrophic wildfire in Los Angeles. The news broke on January 10, 2025.

news.headline: EXEL Industries reported total voting rights and shares at year-end 2024: 16,969,750 euros in share capital.
news.summary: One French Société Anonyme called EXEL Industries has a share capital of €16,969,750 and is headquartered at 54 rue Marcel Paul, 51206 Epernay Cedex, France. It is registered with the Reims Companies Register under No. 095 550 356.

news.headline: Matador Technologies joins "Bitcoin for Corporations" initiative by MicroStrategy, aiming to accelerate Bitcoin adoption.
news.summary: On January 1, 2025, Matador Technologies Inc. (TSXV: MATA) announced its membership in "Bitcoin for Corporations," an initiative founded by MicroStrategy Inc. (NASDAQ: MSTR) and Bitcoin Magazine. The program is designed to educate and assist companies in implementing Bitcoin strategies. By joining, Matador aims to accelerate corporate Bitcoin adoption and enhance its products on the Bitcoin ecosystem. This move is in line with the Company's recent decision, announced on December 23, 2024, to add Bitcoin to its balance sheet as a treasury asset. This strategic shift highlights Matador's commitment to strengthening its position in the digital asset landscape and becoming a leading player in the public markets.

news.headline: Walgreens Boots Alliance's Q1 sales surpass expectations at $39.46B, with 7.5% YoY growth; Adjusted EPS at $0.51.
news.summary: Walgreens Boots Alliance Inc (NASDAQ: WBA) announced a revenue increase of 7.5% year over year, reaching $39.46 billion in the first quarter. This surpassed the expected $37.28 billion, with sales growth seen across all segments. The adjusted operating income for the quarter was $593 million, down from $687 million in the previous year, attributed to lower U.S. retail sales and prior year gains. However, this was partly offset by cost-saving measures and growth in the U.S. Healthcare segment. The adjusted earnings per share stood at $0.51, a decline from $0.66 in the same period last year.

news.headline: Morgan Properties expands with $39M acquisition in Kentucky, entering 20th state; purchased Blankenbaker Crossings in Louisville.
news.summary: Morgan Properties has expanded its reach to 20 states with the recent acquisition of Blankenbaker Crossings in Louisville, Kentucky. This marks a significant milestone for the company as it continues to grow its portfolio of properties.

news.headline: Senator Ted Cruz highlights Bitcoin's benefits for small businesses, endorsing its role in economic growth and as an inflation hedge. Texas emerges as a leading crypto center.
news.summary: During an interview, US Senator Ted Cruz explored the significance of Bitcoin in fostering small business expansion and its potential as a safeguard against inflation. He also highlighted Texas' emergence as a leading cryptocurrency center.

news.headline: Financial markets tumble as U.S. job market thrives in December, causing declines in stocks and bonds.
Phoenix Capital Group closes scholarship apps for 2024, $15,000 award for oil & gas industry. 1st-year students apply, deadline Dec 15, 2024.
news.summary: Phoenix Capital Group Holdings, LLC headquartered in Denver, has recently concluded the application period for the 2024 Phoenix Capital Group Scholarship. This prestigious scholarship, valued at $15,000, garnered considerable interest from first-year college students aspiring to build careers in the oil and gas sector. The company's commitment to fostering the development of future energy experts is evident in the significant response received. The deadline for applications was on December 15, 2024, and the scholarship committee is now in deliberation.

news.headline: Small Satellites Market is growing, with 2,372 units in 2024 expected to reach 2,838 units by 2030, at a 3.0% growth rate.
news.summary: In Dublin, a report titled "Small Satellites Market Size, Share, Trends, Dynamics, Forecast, & Growth Analysis: 2024-2030" is now available through ResearchAndMarkets.com. According to the report, the global yearly installations of small satellites hit 2,372 units in 2024 and are projected to increase to 2,838 units by 2030, showing a growth rate of 3.0%. Small satellites, which fall under this category if they have a wet mass below 1,200 kilograms, come in various weights.

news.headline: Huntington Bancshares Inc. (Nasdaq: HBAN) to announce Q4 2024 results on Jan. 17, 2025, in Columbus, Ohio.
news.summary: Ohio-based Huntington Bancshares Incorporated (Nasdaq: HBAN) is set to unveil its third quarter 2024 financial results on January 17, 2025, prior to the market opening. The data release will include a news announcement and supporting financial information, accessible to the public at that time.

news.headline: Sify Tech to release Q3 FY 2024-25 results on Jan 17, 2025. Leading ICT provider with global services.
news.summary: In Chennai, India, on January 10, 2025, Sify Technologies Limited (NASDAQ: SIFY), a top ICT solutions provider in India offering services in Data Center, Cloud, Networks, Security, and Digital services globally, revealed its plan to disclose its unaudited IFRS financial results for the Third Quarter concluding on December 31, 2024, on Friday, January 17, 2025, before the market opens.

news.headline: OneMedNet is back in compliance with NASDAQ's minimum bid price requirements after boosting its stock price.
US economy adds 256,000 payrolls in December, surpassing economist expectations. Unemployment rate falls to 4.1%.
news.summary: The latest figures show a robust end to 2024 for the labor market, with 256,000 jobs added in December, surpassing expectations and highlighting the resilience of the U.S. economy. This marks a significant increase from the 212,000 jobs added in November. The nonfarm payrolls rose by 256,000, far exceeding the anticipated 160,000. The unemployment rate also saw a decrease from 4.2% to 4.1%, outperforming projections of no change. This positive trend in employment numbers indicates the strength of the U.S. labor market, defying expectations. Additionally, average hourly earnings experienced a 0.3% increase, showcasing further positive economic growth.

news.headline: Custom Ink appoints Arthur Chapin as Chief Product, Design, and Technology Officer; Bailey Rockwell Adrian promoted to Vice President, Power Buyers.
news.summary: In Tyson, Virginia, on January 10, 2025, Custom Ink, a top online provider of custom products and apparel for various entities, revealed the promotion of Bailey Rockwell Adrian to Vice President of Power Buyers. Adrian, previously with Expedia Group and Realtor.com, brings valuable experience to the role. Custom Ink continues to solidify its position in the market with this significant appointment.

news.headline: Fed officials are not in a hurry to lower rates. They want more evidence before concluding the labor market is weakening.
news.summary: Federal Reserve officials have indicated that they will need to see multiple disappointing reports before concluding that the labor market is worsening.

news.headline: U.S. job growth strong as employers add 256,000 jobs in December, pushing unemployment rate down to 4.1%.
news.summary: In December, employers in the United States added 256,000 jobs, surpassing expectations following a period of instability. The unemployment rate also decreased to 4.1 percent, reflecting positive progress in the job market.

news.headline: O'Shaughnessy Ventures invests $100,000 in energy consultant for nuclear power conference in Germany.
news.summary: Mark Nelson has been granted a $100,000 fellowship by O'Shaughnessy Ventures LLC to host a conference focusing on the restart of nuclear technology. The event will convene key stakeholders in Greenwich, Conn. on Jan. 10, 2025. The fellowship will support Nelson in organizing the conference that aims to facilitate discussions and collaborations in the nuclear sector.

news.headline: Money markets price in an ECB deposit rate at 2.2% in July from 2.15% before the US data.
E2open Parent Holdings missed Q3 earnings estimates by 0.0%, reporting EPS of $0.05 on January 10, 2025.
news.summary: On Friday, January 10, 2025, E2open Parent Holdings (NYSE:ETWO) released its Q3 earnings report at 07:45 AM. The company fell short of projected earnings by 0.0%, revealing an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.05. For a detailed analysis of the announcement, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Energy Freedom Technologies in Austin, TX, raises awareness about portals and their impacts on the environment - Jan. 10, 2025.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, on January 10, 2025, Energy Freedom Technologies is delving into the realm of portals and the potential implications for the environment. They define a portal as an energetic gateway with the ability to transport. Through their research and experiments, they aim to uncover the reality behind these portals and their impact. Stay tuned for more updates as they delve further into this innovative field of study.

news.headline: CEO Brian Gould predicts 2025 health trends in Fort Lauderdale, Florida. Stay updated on the latest wellness developments.
news.summary: Fort Lauderdale, Florida - On January 10, 2025, renown health and wellness expert Brian Gould shared his insights on upcoming trends in the industry. With interest in well-being at record levels, Gould predicts new developments on the horizon.

news.headline: Traders pare ECB easing bets and see just three cuts by June.
Traders shift full pricing of the next Fed rate cut to October.
US economy keeps creating jobs, with unemployment rate dropping to 4.1%.
UK rate futures point to about 44bps of Bank of England rate cuts by end of 2025 vs 49 bps before the US labour market data.
Canadian swaps market sees a 53% chance of BoC rate cut in January down from 71% before the jobs data.
Delta Air Lines had a strong Q4 with adj. operating revenue of $14.44B (+5.7% YoY), beating expectations w/ adj EPS of $1.85 (+44.5% YoY).
news.summary: Delta Air Lines, Inc. (NYSE:DAL) shares show premarket increase following the report of strong fourth-quarter 2024 results. Delta revealed a 5.7% rise in adjusted operating revenue to $14.437 billion, with GAAP operating revenue at $15.56 billion, up by 9.4% from the previous year. The adjusted average fuel price decreased to $2.34 per gallon from $3.00, contributing to an adjusted EPS of $1.85, a 44.5% increase year-over-year. Total passenger revenue for the quarter climbed 5% to $12.815 billion, while cargo revenue rose by 32% to $249 million, and Other revenue reached $2.495 billion, a 34% increase. Delta's adjusted operating income was $1.735 billion, a significant increase from $1.33 billion year-over-year, resulting in an adjusted operating margin of 12%, up approximately 230 basis points.

news.headline: StockGro and GIIS Dubai collaborate to enhance youth financial literacy in UAE by equipping students in grades 9-12.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE on January 10, 2025, StockGro, a prominent platform in India offering experiential financial education, has collaborated with the Global Indian International School (GIIS) Dubai to provide crucial financial skills to students in grades 9 to 12. This alliance signifies a significant step towards enhancing financial literacy among young individuals.

news.headline: New "GovCon M&A Talk" podcast by OrangeSlices launches today, focusing on federal government space M&A.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, a debut episode of "GovCon M&A Talk," an OrangeSlices podcast, will be released. The podcast aims to delve into the complexities of mergers and acquisitions in the federal government sector. It will feature discussions with buyers, sellers, and M&A professionals. Sharon B. will host the show, providing insights into the dynamics of dealmaking in this niche industry.

news.headline: New book "The Deep End of Hope in the Wake of Hurricane Helene" by Emma M. Churchman offers unique perspective on disaster recovery in rural Appalachia.
news.summary: In a compelling narrative set in rural Appalachia, Emma M. Churchman, MDiv, introduces readers to a story of survival, trauma, and resilience following Hurricane Helene. Released on January 10, 2025, "The Deep End of Hope" provides a stirring account that captivates audiences. This poignant book sheds light on the challenges faced in Gerton, N.C., in the wake of the disaster. Churchman's exploration of hope amidst adversity showcases the strength of individuals in rebuilding their lives post-catastrophe. This publication is a significant contribution that resonates with readers, with its profound message of perseverance and courage.

news.headline: Sensei launches world's largest autonomous supermarket in Portugal, offering streamlined customer experience. LISBON, Jan. 10, 2025.
news.summary: A global leader in customer experience innovation, Sensei, has unveiled a revolutionary approach to grocery shopping in Lisbon, Portugal. Launched on January 10, 2025, the new system features democratic entry for customers, a streamlined real-time basket checkout process, and enhanced discrepancy detection. By simplifying the shopping experience, Sensei aims to improve efficiency and satisfaction among customers. Check out Sensei's website at https://www.sensei.tech/ for more information.

news.headline: Every Body Eat® earns 'Seed Oil Free' certification, 1st cracker brand to achieve this; leading in clean snacking.
news.summary: In Evanston, Illinois on January 10, 2025, Every Body Eat® made history by becoming the inaugural cracker and cookie brand to receive the Seed Oil Free Certified seal. Known for their popular Cheese-less Thin, the #1 Vegan Cheese Cracker, the brand has successfully redefined clean snacking. This achievement was reached through a collaboration with partners.

news.headline: Traders see the Fed cutting rates once in 2025, no earlier than June, after strong December jobs data.
Hyundai teams up with NVIDIA to boost vehicle safety and productivity with AI and digital twin tech. #partnership
news.summary: Hyundai Motor Group has joined forces with NVIDIA to harness the power of AI and digital twin technologies. This collaboration aims at bolstering vehicle safety, improving manufacturing efficiency, and driving innovation in the realm of robotics. The partnership between the two companies is poised to revolutionize the automotive industry by incorporating cutting-edge technologies. With Hyundai's global presence and NVIDIA's expertise in AI, this collaboration is set to make a significant impact. This partnership represents a crucial step forward in the industry, combining Hyundai's automotive prowess with NVIDIA's technological capabilities. The integration of AI and digital twin technologies is expected to enhance safety standards, boost manufacturing processes, and pave the way for groundbreaking advancements in robotics. This collaboration signifies a strategic move towards a smarter, more efficient future for the automotive sector.

news.headline: Iveda innovates in AI and IoT for global safety with 5 major product launches in 2025, leading in cloud-based applications.
news.summary: In MESA, Arizona, Iveda® (NASDAQ: IVDA) has wrapped up a significant year marked by the launch of five key products. These include LevelNOW™, IvedaAI™ Forensics Desk, IvedaAI™ Cloud, IvedaESS, and VEMO. With a strong focus on AI-driven video analytics and IoT solutions, the company has made a significant impact with its innovative technologies. This has led to success in addressing diverse industry needs through cloud-based applications.

news.headline: VSee Health lands $160,000 contract with Florida health system for home health and TeleNursing, with possibility of future growth.
news.summary: A major health system in Florida has awarded VSee Health, Inc. (Nasdaq: VSEE) with a lucrative contract worth around $160,000. This deal highlights VSee Health's expertise in digital health services and tailored telehealth workflows. The contract could see a substantial increase in value with wider implementation. This collaboration showcases VSee Health's dedication to transforming healthcare delivery with personalized telehealth solutions.

news.headline: Badger Meter (NYSE: BMI) to release Q4 and full year 2024 earnings on Jan 31, 2025. Earnings call at 10:00am CT.
news.summary: Milwaukee-based Badger Meter, Inc. (NYSE: BMI) is set to reveal its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on Friday, January 31, 2025, before the market opens. The company will host an earnings conference call at 10:00am CT on the same day. A live listen-only webcast will be available on the Investor section of Badger Meter's website. Interested individuals can preregister to join the conference call actively.

news.headline: DigitalBridge (NYSE: DBRG) to release Q4 and full year 2024 financial results on Feb 20, 2025 at 8 am ET. Conference call available.
news.summary: DigitalBridge Group, Inc. (NYSE: DBRG) from Boca Raton, Florida stated that they are set to unveil their financial outcomes for the Fourth Quarter and Full Year of 2024 on Thursday, February 20, 2025, before the market opens. A conference call and earnings presentation is scheduled for 8:00 a.m. ET on the same day to delve into the results. The presentation will be live-streamed on the internet, with an accessible webcast link on the Shareholders segment of the company's website at ir.d.

news.headline: inTEST Corp to participate in the Needham Growth Conference. Speaking on recent growth, numbers revealed.
CEO of Rigetti Computing to join fireside chat at 27th Annual Needham Growth Conference on January 14, 2025.
news.summary: In Berkeley, California, a leading company in full-stack quantum-classical computing, Rigetti Computing, Inc. (Nasdaq: RGTI), revealed that its CEO, Dr. Subodh Kulkarni, is set to engage in a fireside chat during the 27th Annual Needham Growth Conference on January 14, 2025.

news.headline: Samsung Bioepis and Teva form a partnership for EPYSQLI® commercialization in U.S, a biosimilar to Soliris®.
news.summary: In a recent joint statement, Samsung Bioepis Co., Ltd. and Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd. disclosed their partnership for EPYSQLI® (eculizumab-aagh), a biosimilar to Soliris® (eculizumab-aagh). This agreement, signed on Jan. 10, 2025, covers the United States (U.S.) market. Samsung Bioepis Co., Ltd. and Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd. have engaged in a license, development, and commercialization deal for this product. Samsung Bioepis Co., Ltd. is a renowned company based in INCHEON, Korea, while Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd. operates out of TEL AVIV, Israel. The partnering companies are listed under NYSE (Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd.) and TASE (Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd.) with ticker symbols TEVA.

news.headline: American Rebel Holdings delivers its largest order yet of American Rebel Light Beer - 400% larger than usual - to Kentucky.
news.summary: American Rebel Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: AREB), based in Nashville, Tennessee, revealed that it has successfully delivered the first batch of American Rebel Light Beer to its new distribution partner, Clark Distributing Company, serving the Commonwealth of Kentucky. This follows the announcement made on October 30, 2024. The initial order marks a significant milestone for American Rebel Beer, being 400% larger than their usual opening orders. The company's Light Beer product is experiencing rapid growth, leading to this substantial order which highlights its expanding national presence. For more information, visit www.americanrebelbeer.com and www.ccclark.com.

news.headline: Yerbaé partners with four distributors to supply 100+ Smith’s Food & Drug locations, aligning with Safety Shot's growth.
news.summary: Yerbaé Brands Corp., a plant-based functional beverage company, has revealed recent partnerships with Carlson Distributing, Bison Beverage, George's Distributing, and Craig Stein Beverage to supply Smith’s Food & Drug stores across the western US. Smith’s Food & Drug, a Kroger subsidiary, has branches in Utah, Nevada, New Mexico, Arizona, Montana, Idaho, and Wyoming. With these distribution deals, Yerbaé products will now be stocked in over 100 Smith's locations in the region. This move is in line with the growth strategy of Safety Shot, Inc. (Nasdaq: SHOT), which intends to acquire Yerbaé.

news.headline: SIMPPLE Ltd. CEO Norman Schroeder issues letter to shareholders of the technology provider, NASDAQ: SPPL.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, SIMPPLE Ltd. (NASDAQ: SPPL), a prominent technology company in the facilities management sector, shared a letter from its CEO, Norman Schroeder, with shareholders.

news.headline: Barington Capital asks TriMas Corporation to hire a financial advisor for strategic options, owning 1.5% of the company.
news.summary: Barington Capital Group, L.P., alongside its affiliates, holding roughly 1.5% of TriMas Corporation (NasdaqGS: TRS), has stated today that they consider the current moment as ideal due to the potential CEO transition.

news.headline: Calidi Biotherapeutics priced $4.25M public offering of 5,000,000 shares at $0.85 each on Jan. 10, 2025.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, Calidi Biotherapeutics, Inc. publicly announced the pricing of its offering of 5,000,000 shares of common stock on the NYSE American under the ticker symbol CLDI. Each share was priced at $0.85. Calidi is a company focused on developing targeted immunotherapies and is currently in the clinical-stage of biotechnology research.

news.headline: Lear Corp will discuss Q4 & full year 2024 financial results on February 6, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. EST via conference call.
news.summary: Lear Corporation, based in Southfield, Michigan, has announced that they will be hosting a conference call on February 6, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. EST to discuss their financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. Stakeholders and interested individuals can join the call by accessing the webcast link provided.

news.headline: NeuroOne® reports record revenue of $6.2 million in Q1 Fiscal 2025, with $3.0M collaboration revenue from Zimmer Biomet.
news.summary: Revenue for the first quarter of fiscal year 2025 saw a significant increase, totaling $6.2 million. This figure includes a one-time upfront payment of $3.0 million in collaboration revenue from Zimmer Biomet, as well as $3.2 million in product revenue.

news.headline: Berkshire Hills Bancorp, Inc. (NYSE: BHLB) to release Q4 2024 earnings on Jan 30, 2025, at 7:30 a.m. (Eastern).
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, Berkshire Hills Bancorp, Inc. (NYSE: BHLB) announced the upcoming schedule for their fourth quarter 2024 earnings release and conference call. The earnings release is set for Thursday, January 30, 2025, around 7:30 a.m. (Eastern Time). The conference call will also take place on the same day.

news.headline: Coca-Cola Consolidated CFO Scott Anthony to retire; Matt Blickley named as the new CFO.
news.summary: The latest report shows a significant increase in the number of COVID-19 cases in the city, with 500 new infections recorded in the past 24 hours. This surge brings the total number of confirmed cases to 10,000, marking a concerning milestone for health officials. Additionally, the death toll has risen to 150, with 10 new fatalities reported today. The spike in cases has put immense pressure on the healthcare system, with hospitals now operating at 90% capacity. Authorities are urging the public to adhere to safety measures and restrictions to curb the spread of the virus.
